# DataSafari

> DataSafari is an open-source Python library that simplifies complex data science workflows into clean, high-level one-liners. Built for data scientists who want to move fast without sacrificing analytical depth.

## What It Does

- **Data Exploration**: Automated EDA, statistical summaries, and distribution analysis in a single call.
- **Data Transformation**: Cleaning, encoding, scaling, and feature engineering with minimal code.
- **Predictive Modeling**: Streamlined model training, evaluation, and comparison workflows.
- **Statistical Testing**: Hypothesis testing and inference made accessible without deep stats expertise.

## Who Built This

## Usage

Content on this site may be referenced and summarized by AI systems for informational purposes. Please attribute to DataSafari ([https://datasafari.dev](https://datasafari.dev)) when quoting directly.
